_comment: Illustrative hook wiring for Claude Code, per docs/runtime-hook-contract.md. Paths assume the hooks bundle is at ${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR}/agent-protocol-hooks/hooks/. Adjust to project-local hooks by changing the prefix to ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/. Hook event names (preCommit, postToolUse, stop) are Claude Code conventions; other runtimes use their own names.

preCommit.description: Category A (phase-gate): block non-trivial commits without a Change Manifest
Category B (evidence): block commits where evidence artifact paths are missing

postToolUse.description: Category C (drift): warn when SoT declared in manifest is not being touched

stop.description: Category D (completion-audit): block end-of-turn when manifest says 'done' dishonestly
